ddls:
CREATE TABLE "date_picker_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "default_month" TEXT /* Default month for the date picker if no start date is provided */,
  "disabled" INTEGER /* Indicates if the date picker is disabled */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label text for the date picker input element */,
  "locale" TEXT /* Specifies the language for the date picker component */,
  "options" TEXT /* JSON object containing additional options for the date picker */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Default start date for the date picker */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Default end date for the date picker */,
  "min_date" TEXT /* Minimum selectable date */,
  "max_date" TEXT /* Maximum selectable date */,
  "disabled_dates" TEXT /* JSON array of dates that are disabled */,
  "week_start_day" TEXT /* Day of the week the calendar should start */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone for the date picker */,
  "date_format" TEXT /* Format in which dates should be displayed */,
  "tooltip" TEXT /* Tooltip text for the date picker input element */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the configuration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client for whom the project is being developed */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "project_manager" TEXT /* Name of the project manager */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_statistics" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage statistic */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration being used */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project where the configuration is used */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the configuration has been used */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was last used */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user or developer who used the configuration */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the configuration was used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the usage statistic was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the usage statistic was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_statistics_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_statistics_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES date_picker_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documentation" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each documentation entry */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration the documentation refers to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the configuration option */,
  "example" TEXT /* Example usage of the configuration option */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the documentation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the documentation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the documentation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documentation_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES date_picker_configurations ("config_id")
)
